nodes.name: Build Claude Payload
nodes.notes: Trims payload: full detail for failed tests only, sample of 20 names for passed tests.

nodes.name: Call Claude API
nodes.notes: Sends pre-built JSON body to Anthropic API. jsonBody is a simple expression referencing the string built by the Code node above.

meta.description: CS4218 AI-driven testing: receives inline test results from CI, calls Claude, posts analysis to PR comments.
